qa.note: qualified = qa_status='pass' (cleared the no-chat + site + email + completeness hard gate). '(unchecked)' = QA auditor hasn't graded yet.

render_mix.note: derived from detected platform/tech-stack (JS framework=>js_rendered, server CMS=>html_server, both=>hybrid). Not a headless-render measurement (egress-gated); honest proxy from real tech signals.

honest_zeros.why: No email SENDER exists in the codebase (verified: zero smtplib/sendgrid/mailgun/ses send calls). Pipeline stops at handoff->WP candidate feed; no campaign sends, so these are TRUE zeros, not display bugs.
